---
title: "nominal eQTLs gathering and exploration"
##output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
suppressMessages({
    library(data.table)
    library(BiocParallel)
    library(qs2)
    library(SummarizedExperiment)
    library(stringi)
    library(GenomicRanges)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(pgenlibr)
    library(openxlsx)
    library(here)
  })
here::i_am('.git/HEAD')
rdsdir=here("processed-data", "rds")
## refdata -> ref folder symlink to CHESS Brain ref data for now
refdir=here("processed-data", "ref") ## some general reference files prepared for our data
eqtl_dir=here("processed-data", "eQTL/tqtl_out")

ds2name <- setNames( c("SpD01-WMtz", "SpD02-L3/4", "SpD03-L6",  "SpD04-WM", "SpD05-L5",
       "SpD06-L2/3","SpD07-L1", "Neun", "Vasc", "PNN", "Neuropil"),  c(paste0('spd0',1:7), "neun", "vasc", "pnn", "neuropil"))
dss <- names(ds2name)

granges <- qs_read(file.path(refdir, "granges.qs2")) ## gene info file created by 00_explore_data.Rmd last chunk
g2sym <- setNames(granges$gene_name, granges$gene_id)
sym2ensg <- setNames(granges$gene_id, granges$gene_name)
## also load GWAS-tensorQTL harmonized variant file (5.12 million variants)
fgwas <- file.path(refdir, 'GWAS_SCZ_tqtl-matched.tab.gz') ## this was created in 03_eqtl_explore.Rmd
if (file.exists(fgwas)) {
  gwas_vars <- fread(fgwas)
} else {
  stop("GWAS-tensorQTL variant-harmonized file not found: ", fgwas, "\nRun 03_eqtl_explore.Rmd to create it.")
}
```

```{r orientation helpers}
fpvar <- here("processed-data", "genotypes", "plink2", "merged_maf05.pvar")
stopifnot("pvar file not found" = file.exists(fpvar))
pvar <- fread(fpvar, sep = "\t")
if ("#CHROM" %in% names(pvar)) setnames(pvar, "#CHROM", "CHROM")
pvar_variant_lut <- pvar[, .(variant_id = ID, pvar_REF = REF, pvar_ALT = ALT)]
setkey(pvar_variant_lut, variant_id)

build_orientation_lut <- function(variant_ids, pvar_lut = pvar_variant_lut) {
  ids <- data.table(variant_id = unique(as.character(variant_ids)))
  ids <- ids[!is.na(variant_id) & nzchar(variant_id)]
  ids[, c("id_chr", "id_pos", "id_REF", "id_ALT") := tstrsplit(
    variant_id, ":", fixed = TRUE, keep = 1:4
  )]

  ori <- pvar_lut[ids, on = "variant_id"]
  ori[, orientation_status := fifelse(
    is.na(pvar_REF) | is.na(pvar_ALT), "missing_pvar",
    fifelse(
      is.na(id_REF) | is.na(id_ALT), "mismatch",
      fifelse(
        id_REF == pvar_REF & id_ALT == pvar_ALT, "aligned",
        fifelse(id_REF == pvar_ALT & id_ALT == pvar_REF, "swapped", "mismatch")
      )
    )
  )]
  ori[, orientation_sign := fifelse(
    orientation_status == "aligned", 1L,
    fifelse(orientation_status == "swapped", -1L, NA_integer_)
  )]
  ori[]
}

add_signfix_columns <- function(dt) {
  stopifnot("variant_id column missing" = "variant_id" %in% names(dt))
  ori <- build_orientation_lut(dt$variant_id)
  out <- merge(dt, ori, by = "variant_id", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
  out[, was_flipped := fifelse(
    orientation_sign == -1L, 1L,
    fifelse(orientation_sign == 1L, 0L, NA_integer_)
  )]

  if ("slope" %in% names(out)) {
    out[!is.na(orientation_sign), slope := slope * orientation_sign]
  }
  if ("af" %in% names(out)) {
    out[!is.na(orientation_sign), af := ifelse(orientation_sign == -1L, 1 - af, af)]
  }
  if ("b_g" %in% names(out)) {
    out[!is.na(orientation_sign), b_g := b_g * orientation_sign]
  }
  if ("b_gi" %in% names(out)) {
    out[!is.na(orientation_sign), b_gi := b_gi * orientation_sign]
  }
  drop_cols <- intersect(
    c("id_chr", "id_pos", "id_REF", "id_ALT", "pvar_REF", "pvar_ALT",
      "orientation_status", "orientation_sign", "was_flipped"),
    names(out)
  )
  if (length(drop_cols) > 0L) out[, (drop_cols) := NULL]
  out[]
}

signfix_suffix <- function(suffix) {
  sub("(\\.tab\\.gz|\\.txt\\.gz)$", "_signfix\\1", suffix)
}

write_signfix_copy <- function(in_file, out_file) {
  dt <- fread(in_file)
  dt_fix <- add_signfix_columns(dt)
  fwrite(dt_fix, out_file, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)
  invisible(nrow(dt_fix))
}
```

```{r}
## read all parquet for a prefix (e.g., "spd01.gene", "vasc.gene")
## keep only min_pval<0.001, add FDR
read_eqtl_nominal <- function(eqtl_dir, prefix, min_pval=0.001) {
  files <- list.files(eqtl_dir, pattern = paste0("^", gsub("\\.", "\\\\.", prefix), ".*\\.parquet$"),
                      full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0L) stop("No parquet files found for prefix: ", prefix)
  dt_list <- lapply(
    files,
    function(f) {
      message(sprintf("    reading %s/%s", basename(dirname(f)), basename(f)))
      as.data.table(arrow::read_parquet(f))
    }
  )
  eqtl_dt <- rbindlist(dt_list, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
  ## ensure character to avoid factor surprises
  message(sprintf("       adding FDR to %s data... ", prefix))
  eqtl_dt[, `:=`(phenotype_id = as.character(phenotype_id),
                 variant_id   = as.character(variant_id),
                 fdr = p.adjust(pval_nominal, method = "fdr"))]
  return(eqtl_dt[pval_nominal <= min_pval])
}

```


```{r gather nominal eqtls for all datasets}
runs <- paste0(c(paste0('spd0',1:7), "neun", "vasc", "pnn", "neuropil"), ".gene")

neqtls <- list() ## loading all nominal eQTLs with pval_nominal<=0.001, with FDR added as a column
for (prefix in runs) {
  fnom001 <- file.path(eqtl_dir, paste0(prefix, ".eqtl-nominal_p001.tab.gz"))
  if (file.exists(fnom001)) {
    message(Sys.time(), " | ", prefix, " | nominal eQTL pval<=0.001 already gathered at ", fnom001)
    neqtls[[prefix]] <- fread(fnom001)
    next
  }
  ## determine output path first so we can skip completed runs
  message(Sys.time(), " | ", prefix, " | reading eQTL parquet...")
  eqdt <- read_eqtl_nominal(eqtl_dir, prefix)
  fwrite(eqdt, fnom001, sep="\t", quote=FALSE)
  ## also write FDR<0.05 subset
  fnomfdr05 <- file.path(eqtl_dir, paste0(prefix, ".eqtl-nominal_FDR05.tab.gz"))
  eqdt_fdr05 <- eqdt[fdr<0.05]
  fwrite(eqdt_fdr05, fnomfdr05, sep="\t", quote=FALSE)
  message(Sys.time(), " | ", prefix, " | written nominal eQTL pval<=0.001 (", nrow(eqdt), " rows) and FDR<0.05 (", nrow(eqdt_fdr05), " rows).")
  neqtls[[prefix]] <- eqdt
}
names(neqtls) <- sub("\\.gene$", "", names(neqtls))
## for neun: search for MAPK3 eQTL: "chr16:30114519:G:C" = rs7542
#ensg <- sym2ensg["MAPK3"] ## "ENSG00000102882"
#eqdt[fdr<0.05][phenotype_id==ensg]
```

```{r write signfix per-context outputs}
contexts <- c(sprintf("spd%02d", 1:7), "neun", "vasc", "pnn", "neuropil")
signfix_targets <- c(
  "gene.eqtl-nominal_FDR05.tab.gz",
  "gene.map_cis.tab.gz",
  "gene.map_independent.txt.gz",
  "gene.DxINT.cis_qtl_top_assoc.txt.gz"
)

for (ctx in contexts) {
  for (suf in signfix_targets) {
    in_file <- file.path(eqtl_dir, sprintf("%s.%s", ctx, suf))
    stopifnot("Missing input eQTL file" = file.exists(in_file))
    out_file <- file.path(eqtl_dir, sprintf("%s.%s", ctx, signfix_suffix(suf)))
    n_written <- write_signfix_copy(in_file, out_file)
    message(sprintf("Wrote signfix file: %s (%d rows)", basename(out_file), n_written))
  }
}
```

```{r orientation sanity checks}
chk_vars <- c("chr16:30114519:G:C", "chr17:46709946:C:T")
chk <- build_orientation_lut(chk_vars)[, .(
  variant_id, id_REF, id_ALT, pvar_REF, pvar_ALT, orientation_status, orientation_sign
)]
print(chk)
stopifnot(chk[variant_id == "chr16:30114519:G:C", orientation_sign] == -1L)
stopifnot(chk[variant_id == "chr17:46709946:C:T", orientation_sign] == 1L)
```

## neun context findings:
> eqtdt[fdr<0.05][phenotype_id==ensg]
      phenotype_id         variant_id start_distance        af ma_samples ma_count pval_nominal      slope   slope_se         fdr
            <char>             <char>          <int>     <num>      <int>    <int>        <num>      <num>      <num>       <num>
1: ENSG00000102882 chr16:30114519:G:C          -8988 0.4761905         47       60 7.032354e-06 -0.5852965 0.10790497 0.026972547
2: ENSG00000102882 chr16:30119172:C:A          -4335 0.4761905         47       60 7.032354e-06 -0.5852965 0.10790497 0.026972547
3: ENSG00000102882 chr16:30135944:C:T          12437 0.4682540         46       59 1.926548e-06 -0.6149577 0.10450523 0.009890641
4: ENSG00000102882 chr16:30183519:A:G          60012 0.4047619         38       51 8.410917e-06 -0.4607696 0.08595245 0.030953732
5: ENSG00000102882 chr16:30186830:A:G          63323 0.4047619         38       51 8.410917e-06 -0.4607696 0.08595245 0.030953732

```{r check MAPK3 eQTL in results}
## search for MAPK3 eQTL: "chr16:30114519:G:C" = rs7542
ensg <- sym2ensg["MAPK3"] ## "ENSG00000102882"
rstgt <- "chr16:30114519:G:C"

mapk3_fdr_counts <- data.table::rbindlist(
  lapply(names(neqtls), function(ctx) {
    dt <- neqtls[[ctx]]
    data.table::data.table(
      context = ctx,
      n_fdr05 = dt[phenotype_id == ensg & fdr < 0.05, .N]
    )
  }),
  use.names = TRUE
)
mapk3_fdr_counts[n_fdr05>0]
#    context n_fdr05
#     <char>   <int>
#1:     neun       5
#2: neuropil      32

## are all these rs7542 ?
mapk3_rs7542_counts <- data.table::rbindlist(
  lapply(names(neqtls), function(ctx) {
    dt <- neqtls[[ctx]]
    data.table::data.table(
      context = ctx,
      n_fdr05_rs7542 = dt[phenotype_id == ensg & fdr < 0.05 & variant_id == rstgt, .N]
    )
  }),
  use.names = TRUE
)
mapk3_rs7542_counts[n_fdr05_rs7542>0]
#    context n_fdr05_rs7542
#     <char>          <int>
#1:     neun              1
#2: neuropil              1

```


```{r}
ensg_kansl1 <- sym2ensg["KANSL1-AS1"] ## "ENSG00000214401"
kansl1_fdr_counts <- data.table::rbindlist(
   lapply(names(neqtls), function(ctx) {
     dt <- neqtls[[ctx]]
     data.table::data.table(
       context = ctx,
       n_fdr05 = dt[phenotype_id == ensg_kansl1 & fdr < 0.05, .N]
     )
   }),
   use.names = TRUE
 )
kansl1_fdr_counts[n_fdr05>0]
#    context n_fdr05 n_GWAS
#     <char>   <int>  <int>
#1:    spd01    2340    1944
#2:    spd02    2631    1995
#3:    spd03    2587    1989
#4:    spd05    2342    1924
#5:    spd06    2601    1989
#6:    spd07    2603    1995
#7:     neun    2446    1989
#8: neuropil    2607    1993
```

```{r}
eqtl_gwas_overlap <- function(neqtls, gene, gwas_vars, sym2ensg, p_thresh = 5e-8, max_fdr = 0.05) {
  ensg <- sym2ensg[gene]
  if (is.na(ensg) || length(ensg) == 0L) stop("Gene not found in sym2ensg: ", gene)

  eqtls <- data.table::rbindlist(
    lapply(names(neqtls), function(ctx) {
      dt <- neqtls[[ctx]]
      dt[
        phenotype_id == ensg & fdr < max_fdr,
        .(context = ctx, variant_id, pval_nominal, fdr, slope, slope_se, start_distance)
      ]
    }),
    use.names = TRUE
  )

  hits <- merge(
    eqtls,
    gwas_vars[, .(
      variant_id,
      gwas_p = p,
      gwas_A1 = A1,
      gwas_rsid = rsid,
      gwas_beta = beta,
      gwas_impinfo = impinfo
    )],
    by = "variant_id",
    all = FALSE
  )[gwas_p <= p_thresh]

  fdr_counts <- eqtls[, .(fdr_pass = .N), by = context]
  gwas_counts <- hits[, .(fdr_gwas_pass = .N), by = context]
  counts <- merge(fdr_counts, gwas_counts, by = "context", all = TRUE)
  counts[is.na(fdr_pass), fdr_pass := 0L]
  counts[is.na(fdr_gwas_pass), fdr_gwas_pass := 0L]
  counts <- counts[order(-fdr_gwas_pass)]

  list(
    gene = gene,
    ensg = ensg,
    p_thresh = p_thresh,
    max_fdr = max_fdr,
    counts = counts,
    hits = hits
  )
}

## test with
r <- eqtl_gwas_overlap(neqtls, "KANSL1-AS1", gwas_vars, sym2ensg)
rmapk3 <- eqtl_gwas_overlap(neqtls, "MAPK3", gwas_vars, sym2ensg)
```

```{r export merged significant tables}
contexts <- c(sprintf("spd%02d", 1:7), "neun", "vasc", "pnn", "neuropil")

assert_files_exist <- function(files) {
  missing <- files[!file.exists(files)]
  if (length(missing) > 0L) {
    stop("Missing required files:\n", paste(missing, collapse = "\n"))
  }
}

assert_cols_exist <- function(dt, cols, label) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(dt))
  if (length(miss) > 0L) {
    stop(sprintf("%s is missing required columns: %s", label, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

drop_pandas_index_cols <- function(dt) {
  if ("V1" %in% names(dt)) dt[, V1 := NULL]
  unnamed <- grep("^Unnamed", names(dt), value = TRUE)
  if (length(unnamed) > 0L) dt[, (unnamed) := NULL]
  dt
}

warn_missing_rsid <- function(dt, label) {
  nmiss <- dt[is.na(rsID), .N]
  if (nmiss > 0L) {
    warning(sprintf(
      "%s has %d rows with no rsID in GWAS_SCZ_tqtl-matched.tab.gz; keeping rsID=NA.",
      label, nmiss
    ))
  }
}

read_ctx_table <- function(ctx, suffix, req_cols = NULL) {
  f <- file.path(eqtl_dir, sprintf("%s.gene.%s", ctx, suffix))
  assert_files_exist(f)
  dt <- fread(f)
  dt <- drop_pandas_index_cols(dt)
  dt[, context := ctx]
  if (!is.null(req_cols)) {
    assert_cols_exist(dt, req_cols, basename(f))
  }
  dt
}

## annotations:
gwas_lut <- unique(gwas_vars[, .(variant_id, rsID = rsid, GWAS = as.integer(p < 5e-8))])
setkey(gwas_lut, variant_id)

## strong coloc lookup by context for gene and lead variant annotations
norm_gene_id <- function(x) sub("\\.\\d+$", "", as.character(x))
f_coloc <- here("processed-data", "eQTL", "coloc", "coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz")
assert_files_exist(f_coloc)
coloc_res <- fread(f_coloc)
assert_cols_exist(coloc_res, c("ds", "fid", "lead_snp"), "coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz")
if ("cat" %in% names(coloc_res)) {
  strong_coloc <- coloc_res[cat == "strong_coloc"]
} else {
  assert_cols_exist(coloc_res, c("PP4"), "coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz")
  warning("coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz has no cat column; using PP4 > 0.8 for strong_coloc fallback.")
  strong_coloc <- coloc_res[PP4 > 0.8]
}
strong_coloc_gene <- unique(strong_coloc[, .(
  context = as.character(ds),
  gene_id_norm = norm_gene_id(fid)
)])
strong_coloc_var <- unique(strong_coloc[, .(
  context = as.character(ds),
  variant_id = as.character(lead_snp)
)])
setkey(strong_coloc_gene, context, gene_id_norm)
setkey(strong_coloc_var, context, variant_id)

## DGE lookup by context: SpD uses layer-adjusted DEGs, SpG uses context-specific DEG files
ds2degs <- list()
spd_degs <- fread(file.path(rdsdir, "10_dx_deg_adjust_spd", "dx-deg_PRECAST07.csv"))
assert_cols_exist(spd_degs, c("ensembl", "fdr_scz"), "dx-deg_PRECAST07.csv")
spd_deg_ids <- unique(spd_degs[fdr_scz <= 0.1 & !is.na(ensembl), ensembl])
for (ds in sprintf("spd%02d", 1:7)) {
  ds2degs[[ds]] <- spd_deg_ids
}

spg_deg_files <- list(
  neun = here("code/analysis", "dx_deg_spg_neun", "neun-dx_DEG-GM.csv"),
  neuropil = here("code/analysis", "dx_deg_spg_neuropil", "neuropil-dx_DEG-GM.csv"),
  pnn = here("code/analysis", "dx_deg_spg_pnn", "pnn-dx_DEG-GM.csv"),
  vasc = here("processed-data", "spg_pb_de", "test_SPD_pseudo_vasc_pos.csv")
)
assert_files_exist(unlist(spg_deg_files, use.names = FALSE))
for (ds in names(spg_deg_files)) {
  ddt <- fread(spg_deg_files[[ds]])
  assert_cols_exist(ddt, c("ensembl", "fdr_scz"), basename(spg_deg_files[[ds]]))
  ds2degs[[ds]] <- unique(ddt[fdr_scz <= 0.1 & !is.na(ensembl), ensembl])
}

if (!setequal(names(ds2degs), contexts)) {
  stop("DGE context mismatch. Have: ", paste(sort(names(ds2degs)), collapse = ", "))
}

## ---- cis (map_cis + map_independent) ----
cis_req <- c("phenotype_id", "variant_id", "start_distance", "qval", "pval_perm", "pval_beta",
             "pval_nominal", "slope", "slope_se", "af", "ma_samples", "ma_count")
indep_req <- c("phenotype_id", "variant_id", "start_distance", "rank", "pval_perm", "pval_beta",
               "pval_nominal", "slope", "slope_se", "af", "ma_samples", "ma_count")

map_cis_all <- rbindlist(lapply(contexts, read_ctx_table, suffix = "map_cis_signfix.tab.gz", req_cols = cis_req),
                         use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
map_cis_sig <- map_cis_all[qval < 0.05]
map_cis_sig[, `:=`(source = "map_cis", map_cis_qval = qval)]

map_indep_all <- rbindlist(lapply(contexts, read_ctx_table, suffix = "map_independent_signfix.txt.gz", req_cols = indep_req),
                           use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
parent_q <- unique(map_cis_all[, .(context, phenotype_id, map_cis_qval = qval)])
map_indep_all <- merge(map_indep_all, parent_q, by = c("context", "phenotype_id"), all.x = TRUE)
map_indep_sig <- map_indep_all[map_cis_qval < 0.05 & pval_perm < 0.05]
map_indep_sig[, `:=`(source = "map_independent", qval = as.numeric(NA))]

cis_all <- rbindlist(list(map_cis_sig, map_indep_sig), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
cis_all[, gene_name := g2sym[phenotype_id]]
cis_all <- merge(cis_all, gwas_lut, by = "variant_id", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
cis_all[is.na(GWAS), GWAS := 0L]
cis_all[, DGE := as.integer(phenotype_id %chin% ds2degs[[context]]), by = context]
cis_all[, gene_id_norm := norm_gene_id(phenotype_id)]
cis_all[, var_coloc := 0L]
cis_all[strong_coloc_var, on = .(context, variant_id), var_coloc := 1L]
cis_all[, gene_coloc := 0L]
cis_all[strong_coloc_gene, on = .(context, gene_id_norm), gene_coloc := 1L]
cis_all[, gene_id_norm := NULL]

## keep one row per context-gene-variant key; prefer map_cis (lead) when both sources contain the same pair
cis_all[, source_priority := fifelse(source == "map_cis", 2L, 1L)]
setorder(cis_all, context, phenotype_id, variant_id, -source_priority, pval_nominal)
cis_all[, `:=`(
  has_map_cis = as.integer(any(source == "map_cis")),
  has_map_independent = as.integer(any(source == "map_independent")),
  map_cis_qval = {
    q <- map_cis_qval[!is.na(map_cis_qval)]
    if (length(q)) min(q) else NA_real_
  }
), by = .(context, phenotype_id, variant_id)]
cis_all <- cis_all[, .SD[1], by = .(context, phenotype_id, variant_id)]
cis_all[, source_priority := NULL]
## source label semantics after collapse:
## map_cis = lead eQTL (including overlap with independent);
## map_independent = independent-only (not lead)
cis_all[, source := fifelse(has_map_cis == 1L, "map_cis", "map_independent")]

## validations
if (cis_all[is.na(gene_name), .N] > 0L) stop("cis_all has missing gene_name values.")
warn_missing_rsid(cis_all, "cis_all")
if (!all(cis_all$context %chin% contexts)) stop("cis_all has unexpected context labels.")
if (!all(cis_all$DGE %in% c(0L, 1L))) stop("cis_all DGE must be 0/1.")
if (!all(cis_all$GWAS %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(cis_all$GWAS))) stop("cis_all GWAS must be non-NA 0/1.")
if (!all(cis_all$var_coloc %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(cis_all$var_coloc))) stop("cis_all var_coloc must be non-NA 0/1.")
if (!all(cis_all$gene_coloc %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(cis_all$gene_coloc))) stop("cis_all gene_coloc must be non-NA 0/1.")
if (!all(cis_all$has_map_cis %in% c(0L, 1L))) stop("cis_all has_map_cis must be 0/1.")
if (!all(cis_all$has_map_independent %in% c(0L, 1L))) stop("cis_all has_map_independent must be 0/1.")
if (cis_all[, anyDuplicated(.SD), .SDcols = c("context", "phenotype_id", "variant_id")] > 0L) {
  stop("cis_all has duplicated context-phenotype_id-variant_id keys after collapse.")
}

lead_missing <- fsetdiff(
  unique(map_cis_sig[, .(context, phenotype_id, variant_id)]),
  unique(cis_all[, .(context, phenotype_id, variant_id)])
)
if (nrow(lead_missing) > 0L) stop("cis lead inclusion check failed.")

setcolorder(cis_all, c(
  "context", "source",
  "phenotype_id", "gene_name", "variant_id",
  "rsID", "GWAS", "DGE", "var_coloc", "gene_coloc",
  "start_distance", "map_cis_qval", "qval", "pval_perm", "pval_beta", "pval_nominal",
  "slope", "slope_se", "af", "ma_samples", "ma_count"
))
cis_all <- cis_all[, .(
  context, source,
  phenotype_id, gene_name, variant_id,
  rsID, GWAS, DGE, var_coloc, gene_coloc,
  start_distance, map_cis_qval, qval, pval_perm, pval_beta, pval_nominal,
  slope, slope_se, af, ma_samples, ma_count
)]
setorder(cis_all, context, source, phenotype_id, pval_nominal)

## ---- nominal BH<0.05 ----
nominal_req <- c("phenotype_id", "variant_id", "start_distance", "fdr", "pval_nominal", "slope",
                 "slope_se", "af", "ma_samples", "ma_count")
nominal_all <- rbindlist(
  lapply(contexts, read_ctx_table, suffix = "eqtl-nominal_FDR05_signfix.tab.gz", req_cols = nominal_req),
  use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE
)
nominal_all <- nominal_all[fdr < 0.05]
nominal_all[, gene_name := g2sym[phenotype_id]]
nominal_all <- merge(nominal_all, gwas_lut, by = "variant_id", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
nominal_all[is.na(GWAS), GWAS := 0L]
nominal_all[, DGE := as.integer(phenotype_id %chin% ds2degs[[context]]), by = context]
nominal_all[, gene_id_norm := norm_gene_id(phenotype_id)]
nominal_all[, var_coloc := 0L]
nominal_all[strong_coloc_var, on = .(context, variant_id), var_coloc := 1L]
nominal_all[, gene_coloc := 0L]
nominal_all[strong_coloc_gene, on = .(context, gene_id_norm), gene_coloc := 1L]
nominal_all[, gene_id_norm := NULL]

if (nominal_all[is.na(gene_name), .N] > 0L) stop("nominal_all has missing gene_name values.")
warn_missing_rsid(nominal_all, "nominal_all")
if (!all(nominal_all$context %chin% contexts)) stop("nominal_all has unexpected context labels.")
if (!all(nominal_all$DGE %in% c(0L, 1L))) stop("nominal_all DGE must be 0/1.")
if (!all(nominal_all$GWAS %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(nominal_all$GWAS))) stop("nominal_all GWAS must be non-NA 0/1.")
if (!all(nominal_all$var_coloc %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(nominal_all$var_coloc))) stop("nominal_all var_coloc must be non-NA 0/1.")
if (!all(nominal_all$gene_coloc %in% c(0L, 1L)) || any(is.na(nominal_all$gene_coloc))) stop("nominal_all gene_coloc must be non-NA 0/1.")

setcolorder(nominal_all, c(
  "context", "phenotype_id", "gene_name", "variant_id",
  "rsID", "GWAS", "DGE", "var_coloc", "gene_coloc",
  "start_distance", "fdr", "pval_nominal", "slope", "slope_se", "af", "ma_samples", "ma_count"
))
nominal_all <- nominal_all[, .(
  context, phenotype_id, gene_name, variant_id,
  rsID, GWAS, DGE, var_coloc, gene_coloc,
  start_distance, fdr, pval_nominal, slope, slope_se, af, ma_samples, ma_count
)]
setorder(nominal_all, context, phenotype_id, pval_nominal)
write_excel_single <- function(main_dt, out_file, main_sheet) {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  addWorksheet(wb, main_sheet)
  writeDataTable(wb, main_sheet, main_dt)
  freezePane(wb, main_sheet, firstRow = TRUE)
  saveWorkbook(wb, out_file, overwrite = TRUE)
}

out_cis <- file.path(eqtl_dir, "cis_independent_FDR05_merged_signfix.xlsx")
out_nom <- file.path(eqtl_dir, "nominal_BH05_merged_signfix.xlsx")

write_excel_single(cis_all, out_cis, "cis_independent")
write_excel_single(nominal_all, out_nom, "nominal_BH05")

message("Wrote: ", out_cis)
message("Wrote: ", out_nom)
message("cis rows: ", nrow(cis_all), " | nominal rows: ", nrow(nominal_all))
```
